message.content:

  "items": [
    {
      "basic": {
        "name": "没有谁",
        "type": "MUSIC",
        "countryName": "中国",
        "year": 2010,
        "ontologyVersion": "v1.0",
        "promptVersion": "CPR-1.2",
        "annotationModelVersion": "GPT-5.5",
        "generatorDate": "2025-04-09",
        "annotationLanguage": "zh-CN",
        "evidenceVersion": "v1.0",
        "confidence": 0.7,
        "primaryMediaType": "MUSIC"
      },
      "semantic": {
        "summary": "张士堂的个人流行抒情专辑《没有谁》，以深情情歌为核心，通过温暖浑厚的嗓音传达爱情中的执着、思念与孤独。专辑编排以钢琴、弦乐为基调，营造温暖而略带忧郁的听感，同名主打歌受超级星光大道观众喜爱，整体风格统一、情感聚焦个人爱情体验。",
        "themes": ["爱情", "思念", "孤独", "执着", "温暖"],
        "keywords": ["张士堂", "情歌", "抒情流行", "温暖嗓音", "思念", "同名主打歌", "超级星光大道"],
        "core_experience": "沉浸于温柔深情的旋律中，感受爱情中甜蜜与苦涩交织的内心波动，产生强烈的情感共鸣与怀旧情绪。",
        "experience_introduction": "《没有谁》通过连贯的情歌编排与张士堂温暖浑厚的声线，将听众逐步导入一个专注于爱情记忆与当下孤独的私密情感空间。歌曲以中慢板为主，旋律流畅，编曲简约而富有感染力，使听众在舒缓的节奏中自然产生思念、感伤与自我反思，整体体验偏重情绪沉浸而非感官刺激，适合在安静环境中独自聆听。"
      },
      "experience_vector": {
        "passion": 0.3,
        "healing": 0.5,
        "awe": 0.1,
        "nostalgia": 0.5,
        "reflection": 0.4,
        "romance": 0.8,
        "tension": 0.2,
        "warmth": 0.8,
        "loneliness": 0.5,
        "hope": 0.4
      },
      "psychology_vector": {

          "abstractness": 0.2,

        },

        },
        "social": {

          "love": 0.9,
          "community": 0.1,
          "competition": 0.1,
          "cooperation": 0.1,
          "power_relationship": 0.1,
          "identity": 0.2
        },
        "value": {
          "freedom": 0.2,
          "order": 0.1,
          "truth": 0.4,
          "beauty": 0.7,
          "achievement": 0.1,
          "justice": 0.1,
          "sacrifice": 0.3,
          "self_exploration": 0.3,
          "tradition": 0.3,

          "survival": 0.1,
          "meaning": 0.4
        },
        "behavior": {
          "curiosity": 0.1,
          "creation": 0.1,
          "adventure": 0.1,

          "competition": 0.1,
          "social": 0.2,
          "discipline": 0.1,
          "risk": 0.1,
          "calm": 0.4,
          "escape": 0.3
        },
        "sensory": {
          "visual_intensity": 0.1,
          "color_richness": 0.1,
          "sound_intensity": 0.8,
          "rhythm_energy": 0.4,
          "atmosphere": 0.7,
          "immersion": 0.6
        }
      },
      "media_vector": {
        "music_vector": {
          "genre": "流行抒情",
          "tempo": 0.4,
          "energy": 0.4,
          "vocal_style": "温暖浑厚男声",
          "instrumentation": "钢琴, 弦乐, 吉他",
          "production_style": "经典流行制作",
          "lyrical_theme": "爱情, 思念, 孤独",
          "emotional_scene": "夜晚独处, 回忆",
          "cultural_context": "台湾流行音乐, 超级星光大道"
        }
      },
      "vector_facts": [
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.passion", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "专辑以抒情为主，情感内敛，缺乏强烈的热情迸发。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.healing", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "温暖嗓音与舒缓旋律带来一定程度的心理抚慰。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.awe", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "音乐整体平实，不追求震撼或崇高感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.nostalgia", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "歌词反复追忆过往爱情，引发听众对逝去情感的怀旧。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.reflection", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "聆听时可能被引导去回忆个人情感经历，产生轻度内省。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.romance", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "整张专辑以爱情为主题，充满浪漫化的情感表达。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.tension", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "旋律和编曲避免冲突感，几乎不制造紧张气氛。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.warmth", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "张士堂的嗓音和编曲的暖色调共同营造出强烈的温暖体验。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.loneliness", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "多首歌曲描写独自思念的状态，传递中等程度的孤独感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "experience_vector.hope", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "部分歌词隐含对重逢或爱的期盼，但整体希望感并不强烈。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.abstractness", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "歌词直白叙述情感，无需抽象概念即可理解。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.complexity", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "旋律、和声与歌词结构简单，缺乏多层次的交织。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.depth_of_thought", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "主题集中于爱情，未涉及更深层的哲学或社会思考。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.logical_structure", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "作为歌曲集，无叙事逻辑，亦无明显的概念性顺序。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.novelty", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "在2010年台湾流行乐坛中，风格沿袭传统情歌路线，创新性较低。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.exploration", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不鼓励探索未知领域，情感疆界亦局限于既有爱情模式。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.ambiguity", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "表达清晰明确，情感指向单一，几乎不存在歧义。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.predictability", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "旋律走向、和弦进程及副歌结构高度符合流行情歌惯例。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.information_density", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "每首歌曲承载的信息量有限，专注于单一情感的反复渲染。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.cognitive.learning_value", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不提供历史文化或社会层面的知识增量。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.personal_scale", "score": 0.9, "explanation": "几乎全部内容聚焦于第一人称的个体情感世界。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.relationship_scale", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "重点描绘两人间的亲密关系及其变化。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.social_scale", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "极少提及社会背景，人际关系仅限爱情层面。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.civilization_scale", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不涉及文明、历史或宏大叙事。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.cosmic_scale", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "无宇宙、哲学或形而上的视野。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.time_span", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "叙事时间跨度短，通常局限于当下的记忆或瞬间。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.worldview.fantasy_level", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "完全基于现实爱情经历，无幻想元素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.happiness", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "温馨中带有伤感，纯粹的快乐瞬间很少。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.sadness", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "失去与思念是重要的情感底色，引发明显的哀愁。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.loneliness", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "独自面对爱情回忆是反复出现的意象，孤独感显著。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.warmth", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "人声与编曲的温暖质感持续存在于整张专辑，中和了悲伤。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.fear", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不刻意营造恐惧或惊悚氛围。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.tension", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "音乐平缓，缺乏戏剧性的紧张起伏。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.awe", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "专辑未触及壮丽或令人敬畏的题材。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.nostalgia", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "回望过去爱情的歌词引发怀旧情绪。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.hope", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "虽然偶尔流露期盼，但希望的强度被忧郁掩盖。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.melancholy", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "整张专辑笼罩在一种持久的、温和的忧郁之中。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.anger", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "歌词中没有明显的愤怒或指责。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.emotion.peace", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "舒缓的节奏带来一定的平静感，但被忧伤冲淡。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.beauty", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "旋律优美，编曲和谐，具备较高的大众审美价值。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.minimalism", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "配器相对简单，但未达到极简主义的程度。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.luxury", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不展现奢华或富丽堂皇的质感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.darkness", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "整体色调偏暗但非沉重，避免过度阴暗。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.brightness", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "温暖的声线与旋律带来柔和的明亮感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.dreamlike", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "部分歌曲氛围朦胧，但整体仍扎根于现实。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.mystery", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "情感表达直接，不制造神秘莫测的效果。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.experimental", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "编曲和演唱方式遵循传统，无实验性尝试。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.classical", "score": 0.5, "explanation": "采用经典的华语流行情歌范式，具有传统美感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.aesthetic.modern", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "虽有现代流行制作痕迹，但本质上仍是经典风格。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.plot_complexity", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "专辑非概念性叙事，无连贯的情节线。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_depth", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "没有角色塑造，只有抒情的自我投射。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.character_growth", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不涉及人物成长或转变。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.world_building", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "未构建虚构世界或完整的背景设定。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.nonlinear_structure", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "曲目之间无明显非线性结构。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.slow_immersion", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "缓慢的节奏使听众逐渐沉浸到情感氛围中。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.action_intensity", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "完全没有动作或戏剧性的事件推进。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.conflict_intensity", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "仅有轻微的爱情冲突，且被温柔处理。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.narrative.philosophical_depth", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不涉及哲学思辨或深刻讨论。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.individualism", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "强调个人情感体验，但非宣扬独立或独特自我。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.collectivism", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "无任何集体主义或群体意识的表达。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.family", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "歌词未涉及家庭关系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.friendship", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "友情主题完全缺席。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.love", "score": 0.9, "explanation": "爱情是唯一且核心的人际关系，贯穿全部作品。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.community", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "没有任何社区或社会归属感的表现。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.competition", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不存在竞争或对抗关系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.cooperation", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "无合作主题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.power_relationship", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不涉及权力结构或支配关系。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.social.identity", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "偶尔触及自我认知，但未深入探索身份问题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.freedom", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "歌词不强调自由，反而更多展现情感的束缚。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.order", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不表达秩序或规则的重要性。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.truth", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "重视真实情感流露，但不以揭示更高真理为目标。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.beauty", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "音乐美感是专辑的核心价值追求之一。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.achievement", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "与事业成就或成功无关。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.justice", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不涉及正义或公平议题。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.sacrifice", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "歌词中隐含为爱付出或牺牲的意象。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.self_exploration", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "促使听众审视自身感情，但专辑本身不深入探索。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.tradition", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "音乐风格延续了华语传统情歌的路线。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.change", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "内容上不倡导改变或革新。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.survival", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "与生存斗争无关。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.value.meaning", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "作品意图赋予爱情体验以意义，但深度有限。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.curiosity", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不激发求知的欲望。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.creation", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不鼓励创造性的行为。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.adventure", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "完全脱离冒险精神。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.reflection", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "听歌时可能会引发对个人情感的轻度反思。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.competition", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "无竞争元素。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.social", "score": 0.2, "explanation": "独自聆听为主，非社交场合音乐。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.discipline", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "不涉及自律或纪律。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.risk", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "没有冒险或高风险的倾向。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.calm", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "音乐整体舒缓，能够平复焦虑。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.behavior.escape", "score": 0.3, "explanation": "可能提供暂时脱离现实的避世感。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.visual_intensity", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "专辑以听觉为主，视觉包装不突出。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.color_richness", "score": 0.1, "explanation": "封面设计简约，色彩单一。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.sound_intensity", "score": 0.8, "explanation": "以人声和乐器为主要感知通道，听觉刺激丰富。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.rhythm_energy", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "节奏中慢，能量中等偏低，适合放松。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.atmosphere", "score": 0.7, "explanation": "整体氛围感强烈，构建了统一的情感空间。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "psychology_vector.sensory.immersion", "score": 0.6, "explanation": "持续的温情与忧郁容易将人带入情感沉浸状态。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.music_vector.tempo", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "歌曲多为中慢板，节奏舒缓。" },
        { "dimensionPath": "media_vector.music_vector.energy", "score": 0.4, "explanation": "整体能量输出平稳，没有剧烈波动。" }
      ],
      "experience_vector_summary": {

semantic: 包括summary, themes, keywords, core_experience, experience_introduction。需要撰写。

summary: 基于介绍，写高信息密度摘要。作品是流行抒情专辑，以情歌为主，展露温暖嗓音，受到观众好评。可以写：张士堂的个人流行抒情专辑，以深情情歌为主题，通过温暖浑厚的嗓音传达爱情中的执着、思念与孤独，融合流行乐器编排，整体氛围温暖而略带忧郁。

themes: 爱情、思念、孤独、执着、温暖

keywords: 张士堂, 情歌, 抒情流行, 温暖嗓音, 思念, 同名主打歌, 超级星光大道

core_experience: 描述聆听专辑的心理体验：沉浸在温柔深情的旋律中，感受爱情的甜蜜与苦涩，产生情感共鸣。

experience_vector: 基于情歌特点，可能：passion (热情)较低，因为抒情; healing (治愈)可能中等; awe (敬畏)低; nostalgia (怀旧)可能中等; reflection (反思)中等; romance (浪漫)高; tension (紧张)低; warmth (温暖)高; loneliness (孤独)中等; hope (希望)中等。具体分数要斟酌。

psychology_vector: 所有子维度。

cognitive: abstractness较低，因为是流行情歌，歌词直白；complexity低；depth_of_thought低；logical_structure低；novelty相对低；exploration低；ambiguity低；predictability高；information_density低；learning_value低。但也要有些区别。

worldview: personal_scale高，因为爱情个人情感；relationship_scale高；social_scale低；civilization_scale低；cosmic_scale低；time_span短；fantasy_level低。

emotion: happiness中等；sadness中等；loneliness中等；warmth高；fear低；tension低；awe低；nostalgia中等；hope中等；melancholy中等；anger低；peace中等。

aesthetic: beauty中等；minimalism中等；luxury低；darkness低；brightness中等；dreamlike低；mystery低；experimental低；classical中等；modern中等。

narrative: 针对音乐，可以理解为情感叙事，但这是一张专辑，歌曲集。应使用描述性维度。我们按照规范，解释这些维度为表达性结构。对于流行专辑，plot_complexity低，character_depth可能低（因为没有角色），但是可以解释为情感深度？规范说对于非叙事作品，解释为表达结构。但可能可以直接给低分。world_building低，等等。我们适当赋值：plot_complexity: 0.2 （无情节），character_depth: 0.1，character_growth: 0.05，world_building: 0.1，nonlinear_structure: 0.1，slow_immersion: 0.3，action_intensity: 0.1，conflict_intensity: 0.3，philosophical_depth: 0.2。

social relationship: 以爱情为主，所以 love 高；individualism 中等因为表达个人情感；collectivism 低；family 低；friendship 低；community 低；competition 低；cooperation 低；power_relationship 低；identity 中等（自我认同）。

value: 爱情歌曲可能突出 beauty, truth, meaning 等。freedom 低，order 低，truth 中等（真实情感），beauty 高，achievement 低，justice 低，sacrifice 中等，self_exploration 中等，tradition 中等，change 低，survival 低，meaning 中等。

behavior: 聆听音乐的行为倾向：curiosity 低，creation 低，adventure 低，reflection 中等，competition 低，social 低，discipline 低，risk 低，calm 中等，escape 中等（逃避现实？）。

sensory: 音乐专辑，所以 visual_intensity 低，但有封面设计，也许低；color_richness 低；sound_intensity 高，因为是音乐；rhythm_energy 中等偏慢，抒情；atmosphere 高，温暖沉浸；immersion 高。

music_vector: 包括 genre, tempo, energy, vocal_style, instrumentation, production_style, lyrical_theme, emotional_scene, cultural_context。需要给出中文。genre: "流行抒情"；tempo: 较慢，0.3左右；energy: 中等偏低，0.4；vocal_style: "温暖浑厚男声"；instrumentation: "钢琴, 弦乐, 吉他"；production_style: "经典流行制作"；lyrical_theme: "爱情, 思念, 孤独"；emotional_scene: "夜晚独处, 回忆"；cultural_context: "台湾流行音乐, 超级星光大道"。

personality_affinity: 根据CPR推断。可能适合Fi较高（个人情感）、Si较高（怀旧传统）、较低Se（非感官刺激），以及 Assertive 和 Turbulent 看情绪稳定性。歌词深情略带忧郁，可能 Turbulent 较高。我们计算：Ni 低，Ne 低，Ti 低，Te 低，Fi 高（个人情感共鸣），Fe 中等（爱情共鸣可能也属Fe），Si 中等偏高（怀旧，熟悉旋律），Se 低（感官体验不强）。openness 中等，conscientiousness 中等，extraversion 中等偏低，agreeableness 中等偏高，neuroticism 中等偏高（忧郁情绪）。Assertive 低，Turbulent 高。具体分数需合理。

supporting_evidence: 生成8-15条事实。基于专辑内容，如“专辑以抒情流行为主要音乐风格。” “同名主打歌《没有谁》表达了对爱人的深情思念。” “张士堂的嗓音温暖浑厚，适合演绎情歌。” “歌曲编曲以钢琴和弦乐为主，营造出温暖的氛围。” “歌词主题围绕爱情中的执着与孤独展开。”等。

vector_facts: 每个维度一个解释。需要为所有数值维度（experience_vector, psychology_vector各子维度, music_vector数值维度）生成。music_vector非数值维度（字符串）不需要解释。大约100个维度？我们要确保 completeness。我们将尽力生成简明的解释。
